variables.notes: No revenue/sales candidates were provided in the candidate list, so REVT is left empty by construction.
No COGS-related candidates were provided in the candidate list, so COGS is left empty by construction.

candidates.why: Listed as a candidate but this is operating income, not an overhead expense. SG&A should include overhead expenses, not income lines.

candidates.row_label: Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Explicit SG&A-related stock-based compensation; clearly an overhead expense component.
Typical SG&A-type overhead bucket; excludes COGS and is part of operating expenses.

final_choice.row_label: Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses

variables.notes: Selected the clear SG&A overhead components and excluded 'Other operating income' since it is income, not an SG&A expense.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: This is an income-statement expense directly related to capitalized R&D; best proxy for R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Costs - Accumulated Amortization & Impairment
candidates.why: Balance sheet account, not a period expense; less appropriate for XRD.
Balance sheet gross asset, not an expense.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Costs - Net - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing/net asset figure, not a direct expense line.

final_choice.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental

variables.notes: Used the income-statement amortization of capitalized R&D as the R&D expense proxy; balance sheet R&D asset lines were not used.

candidates.why: Direct interest expense on debt; primary interest expense line.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest component of lease liabilities; a form of interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental detail of lease interest expense; useful fallback if primary line missing.
Interest income, not expense; included only as a last-resort fallback per instruction to list multiple possible lines.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Provided a priority list of interest-related lines, starting with the most direct interest expense. Later processing will pick the first non-missing value per year.

candidates.why: Component of equity, but not total book equity.
Explicit total shareholders’ equity; appropriate for book equity.
Total equity figure, numerically equal to Shareholders’ Equity - Total; also valid as book equity.
Balancing item, not a primary reported total.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Technical balancing line; not the equity amount itself.
Represents total assets / total equity & liabilities; not pure equity.

variables.notes: Used the reported total equity lines and avoided balancing and combined equity+liabilities totals.
No minority interest / non-controlling interest candidates were provided; treated as not present.
